articles.title: US faces elevated terrorism threats against backdrop of Iran war and cuts at FBI, Justice Department
articles.description:
The three acts of violence in the last week have laid bare a heightened terrorism threat unfolding against the backdrop of the U.S. war with Iran.

The post US faces elevated terrorism threats against backdrop of Iran war and cuts at FBI, Justice Department appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Heightened terrorism threats reported in the U.S. amid ongoing conflict with Iran.
Three violent incidents occurred last week, raising concerns for local safety.
Boston residents may experience increased security measures and vigilance from law enforcement.

articles.title: From rockets to cancer research, here’s how the number pi is embedded in our lives
articles.description:

summary: Researchers at MIT utilize pi in advanced cancer research techniques.

Boston's educational institutions incorporate pi in STEM programs for students.

articles.title: Why some women are hiding their boyfriends online
articles.description:
A conversation with Chanté Joseph about why straight women are rethinking how much they want to center men in their lives.

summary: Chanté Joseph discusses women reassessing online relationship visibility in Boston.

articles.title: He’s running the Boston Marathon for a camp ‘where illness takes a back seat to fun’
articles.description:
The Hole in the Wall Gang Camp is an organization that gives children with serious medical conditions the chance to simply be kids, in a medically safe environment.

The post He’s running the Boston Marathon for a camp ‘where illness takes a back seat to fun’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Griffin O'Neill is running the Boston Marathon to support The Hole in the Wall Gang Camp.
The camp provides a safe environment for children with serious medical conditions.
Funds raised will enhance recreational opportunities for Boston's youth facing health challenges.

articles.title: Eagles reportedly ‘will not trade A.J. Brown at this time’ amid Patriots’ continued interest
articles.description:
However, trade discussions could resume once salary cap relief on June 1 approaches.

summary: Eagles confirm A.J. Brown will not be traded amid Patriots' interest.
